title: TelegramConfig
description: Per-channel TOML config for the Telegram Bot API adapter.

credential_handle.description: Key used to look up the bot token in the wcore-config credentials store (OS keychain by default).

allowed_chat_ids.description: Optional allow-list of chat IDs (as strings — Telegram chat_ids fit in i64 but stringify for negative supergroup ids). When non-empty, inbound messages whose chat.id is not in the list are dropped before reaching poll_events.

long_poll_timeout_secs.description: Long-poll wait seconds passed as the `timeout` query param to getUpdates.
